footer.tagline: AI-powered retinal screening jo aankhon ki bimari jaldi pakad le. Speed, accuracy aur accessibility ke liye banaya gaya.
footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ Sirf screening assistance ke liye. Professional medical diagnosis ka substitute nahi.

landing.subtext: Retinal fundus image upload karein aur turant AI-powered screening report paayein — diagnosis, confidence score aur clinical recommendations ke saath.
landing.loginPatient: Patient ke Roop Mein Login Karein
landing.loginClinic: Clinic / Camp ke Roop Mein Login Karein
landing.whyTitle: Aankhon Ki Bimari Jaldi Pakadna Kyun Zaroori Hai
landing.whyDesc: Har saal laakhon log apni aankhein kho dete hain — isliye nahi ki ilaaj nahi hai, balki isliye ki bimari bahut der se pakdi jaati hai.
landing.why1: Duniya bhar mein 2.2 billion logon ko vision ki problem hai.
landing.why2: Kam se kam 1 billion cases der se detection ki wajah se roke ja sakte the.
landing.why3: Rural aur low-income abaadi ko eye specialists tak sabse kam access hai.
landing.why4: AI screening yeh gap bhar sakti hai — fast, affordable aur scalable.
landing.stat3Label: Cases jisme jaldi detection se madad mili
landing.stat4Label: AI ko ek patient screen karne ka time
landing.howDesc: Patients, clinics aur eye screening camps ke liye ek simple chaar-step flow.
landing.step1Desc: Seconds mein sign up karein — koi credit card nahi chahiye.
landing.step2Desc: Naam, ID, umar aur scan hone wali aankh fill karein.
landing.step3Desc: Apne device se fundus photograph drag aur drop karein.
landing.step4Desc: Diagnosis, confidence score aur recommendations milein.
landing.whyAIDesc: Speed, screening support aur better healthcare experience ke liye banaya gaya.
landing.feat1Desc: Retinal image upload karein aur 3 seconds mein detailed screening report paayein.
landing.feat2Desc: 80,000+ annotated retinal images par trained model.
landing.feat3Desc: Diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, macular degeneration aur aur bhi conditions ke liye screening.
landing.feat4Desc: Confidence scores, risk levels aur clinical recommendations turant.
landing.condTitle: Hum Jo Conditions Detect Karte Hain
landing.condDesc: Major retinal aur eye health conditions ke liye AI-assisted support.
landing.disclaimerText: EyeScreen AI ek assistive screening tool hai aur definitive medical diagnosis nahi deta. Sabhi results ek qualified ophthalmologist se verify karwaane chahiye.
landing.ctaTitle: Ek Patient Screen Karne Ke Liye Taiyaar Hain?
landing.ctaDesc: EyeScreen AI access karne ka tarika chunein aur seconds mein apna screening workflow shuru karein.

about.title: Hum Rokne Layak Andhaapan Khatam Karne Ke Mission Par Hain
about.subtitle: EyeScreen AI ko Team Blur Busters ne ek hackathon mein banaya — developers ka ek group jo technology se real healthcare problems solve karna chahta hai.
about.missionText: Har healthcare worker ko jaldi aankhon ki bimari detection accessible banana — location, resources ya specialists tak access ki parwah kiye bina.
about.visionText: Ek aisi duniya jahan koi bhi us bimari se apni aankhein na khoye jo jaldi pakdi ja sakti thi.
about.problemTitle: Hum Jo Samasya Solve Kar Rahe Hain
about.problemSub: Rokne layak andhaapan ek global crisis hai
about.stat1Label: Duniya bhar mein vision problem wale log
about.stat2Label: Andhaapan ke cases rok sakte hain
about.stat3Label: Diabetes wale logon mein retinopathy hoti hai
about.problemText1: Rural India mein patients ghanton safar karte hain ek eye specialist se milne ke liye — sirf yeh jaanne ke liye ki unki condition treatment se aage badh gayi hai.
about.problemText2: EyeScreen AI kisi bhi healthcare worker ke haath mein ek powerful screening tool deta hai.
about.val1Desc: Har prediction hazaron clinically annotated retinal images par trained model se backed hai.
about.val2Desc: Hum patient ke liye banate hain — jaldi detection, clear reports aur better outcomes.
about.val3Desc: Rural aur low-resource settings mein healthcare workers ke liye design kiya gaya.
about.val4Desc: Hum confidence scores clearly batate hain aur hamesha specialist verification recommend karte hain.
about.aiTitle: AI-Assisted Eye Screening Kyun Zaroori Hai
about.ai1: AI 3 seconds se kam mein retinal image analyze kar sakta hai.
about.ai2: Deep learning models subtle patterns detect karte hain jo untrained eye ko nahi dikhte.
about.ai3: AI screening infinitely scale hoti hai.
about.ai4: Yeh low-risk cases pre-filter karke specialists par burden kam karta hai.
about.ai5: Yeh non-specialist healthcare workers ko informed referral decisions lene mein empower karta hai.
about.ai6: AI se jaldi detection treatment costs 80% tak kam kar sakti hai.

faq.title: Aksar Pooche Jaane Wale Sawaal
faq.subtitle: EyeScreen AI ke baare mein sab kuch jo aapko jaanna chahiye.
faq.stillDesc: Jo dhoondh rahe hain woh nahi mila? Hamari team se seedha contact karein.
faq.q1: EyeScreen AI aankhon ki bimari kaise detect karta hai?
faq.a1: EyeScreen AI ek deep learning model (CNN) use karta hai jo 80,000+ annotated retinal fundus images par trained hai.
faq.a2: Hamara model 5+ conditions mein 92.2% detection accuracy achieve karta hai.
faq.q3: System kis type ki images accept karta hai?
faq.a3: EyeScreen AI JPG, PNG, ya TIFF format mein retinal fundus photographs accept karta hai, maximum 10 MB.
faq.q4: Analysis mein kitna time lagta hai?
faq.a4: Analysis aam taur par image upload hone ke 3 seconds se kam mein complete hoti hai.
faq.q5: Kya EyeScreen AI ek ophthalmologist ki jagah le sakta hai?
faq.a5: Nahi. EyeScreen AI ek screening assistance tool hai. Sabhi results ek qualified ophthalmologist se verify karwaane chahiye.
faq.q6: Screening report mein kya hota hai?
faq.a6: Har report mein hota hai: detected condition, risk level, AI confidence score, clinical recommendations.
faq.q7: Confidence scores ka kya matlab hai?
faq.a7: Confidence score (0–100%) batata hai ki AI model apni prediction ke baare mein kitna sure hai.
faq.q8: Kya main report print ya save kar sakta hoon?
faq.a8: Haan. Har report mein ek Print button hai. Aap ise PDF ke roop mein bhi save kar sakte hain.
faq.q9: Reports kitne time tak store rehti hain?
faq.a9: Reports temporarily aapke browser ke session storage mein store hoti hain.
faq.q10: Kya mera patient data aapke servers par store hai?
faq.a10: Nahi. EyeScreen AI kisi bhi patient data ya retinal images ko external servers par store nahi karta.
faq.q11: Kya retinal image cloud server par upload hoti hai?
faq.a11: Current version mein, image processing ke liye local backend server par bheji jaati hai.
faq.q12: Kya EyeScreen AI HIPAA compliant hai?
faq.a12: Current version ek hackathon prototype hai aur HIPAA compliance ke liye certified nahi hai.
faq.q13: Kya mujhe EyeScreen AI use karne ke liye account chahiye?
faq.a13: Haan. Screening tool access karne ke liye aapko ek free account banana hoga.
faq.q14: Kya EyeScreen AI use karna free hai?
faq.a14: Haan, EyeScreen AI abhi bilkul free hai.
faq.q15: Main apna password bhool gaya. Main ise kaise reset karoon?
faq.a15: Current prototype mein, aap ek naya account bana sakte hain. Future versions mein full password reset available hoga.
